items.summary: Ensure the standalone HTML/CSS/JS version of ByteMeal (located in frontend/standalone/) is complete, self-contained, and fully functional as a downloadable package. All pages — index.html (Home), donor-form.html, assistance-form.html, volunteer-form.html, food-listings.html, and dashboard.html — must be fully linked to the shared styles.css and script.js files using relative paths, so that the entire frontend/standalone/ folder can be downloaded and opened directly in a browser without any server, build tools, or framework.

Ensure the standalone styles.css comprehensively covers all pages with the ByteMeal Glassmorphism design system: Vibrant Orange (#FF6B2B) and Sky Blue (#38BDF8) accent colors, frosted-glass card styles (backdrop-filter: blur, semi-transparent backgrounds), smooth rounded corners, subtle box shadows, a dark food-themed gradient background on all pages, Inter font loaded from Google Fonts CDN, and full mobile/tablet/desktop responsiveness via CSS media queries.

Ensure the standalone script.js file provides all shared JavaScript utilities needed across all pages: hamburger navigation toggle, toast notification display, localStorage read/write helpers for donations, assistance requests, and volunteer records, form validation helpers, and button loading state management. Each HTML page must include a script block that calls the appropriate functions for its own page logic (form submission, data rendering, stats counting).
